## What are you trying to create?

Short film, animation, ad, music video, trailer, series, game cinematic, or another format?

## Where do current AI tools fail?

Describe the painful part of the workflow.

## What should a director be able to control?

Examples: story, characters, locations, props, shots, rhythm, voiceover, music, references, continuity, review points.

## Any examples or references?

Add notes, links, screenshots, or a rough director formula.
